_publications._publicationTitle: Long Noncoding RNA WT1-AS Inhibit Cell Malignancy via miR-494-3p in Glioma.

_contextSnippet: EdU incorporation ratios were significantly lower in WT1-AS plasmid transfected U87 and U118 cells
details: EdU incorporation ratios were significantly lower in WT1-AS plasmid transfected cells compared to control
